highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 previews the Skia m151 engine update with broad managed-code performance improvements.
highlights_body: It eliminates allocations in hot paths across HarfBuzzSharp, SKShaper, SKColor, and SKFourByteTag, fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData, and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries for .NET 11 WebAssembly.

bullets.detail: The bundled renderer moves to Chrome milestone 151, including three rounds of upstream bug-fix syncs that land on top of the initial milestone bump.
Drops the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define from the Skia submodule so Emscripten builds no longer report macro redefinition noise.
SKColor.Parse and TryParse gain ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads and the hex-to-component path is rewritten to avoid intermediate allocations.

bullets.lead: GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context
bullets.detail: The unnecessary unsafe modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, making the type usable without enabling unsafe code in calling projects.

bullets.lead: HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper hot paths go allocation-free
bullets.detail: HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder instead of allocating per call; HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse drop their per-call char[4] allocations; SKShaper reads glyph results through zero-copy spans.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: The SKRectI overload of SKImage.FromEncodedData was leaking a native reference on every call; the handle is now correctly released.

bullets.lead: CPU raster regression from m151 resolved
bullets.detail: Restores SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT so the CPU rasteriser produces correct output after the m151 engine update.
Adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 native slices required to run SkiaSharp under .NET 11 WebAssembly.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: WebAssembly build cleanup, the golden-image visual regression test harness, and Emscripten 5.0.6 static library support for .NET 11

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly build cleanup.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 added the managed-performance sweep — allocation-free HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8, zero-copy SKShaper glyph reads, ReadOnlySpan<char> SKColor parsing, the GRContextOptions unsafe removal, and the SKImage.FromEncodedData leak fix.

harfbuzz_summary: Picks up HarfBuzz 14.2.1 and eliminates allocations in the Tag.Parse hot path and the Buffer.AddUtf8 text-encode path.
